Transformative design build home remodeling that celebrates your unique lifestyle!

Terzetto Homes is a premier design build remodel firm in Ottawa, offering homeowners a single point of contact for every stage of renovation — from initial concept to design, construction, and final completion.

get a free quote
our projects

Our Design Build Remodel Services

Kitchen Remodel

Elevate your culinary space with our custom kitchen remodel services in Ottawa. We blend modern designs with functionality to create kitchens that are both beautiful and practical.​

Bathroom Remodel

Transform your bathroom into a luxurious retreat with our expert bathroom remodel services in Ottawa. We focus on innovative designs and quality craftsmanship to deliver exceptional results.

Home Remodel

Reimagine your entire living space with our whole home remodel services in Ottawa. We tailor every project to reflect your unique style and needs, ensuring a cohesive and personalized renovation.

all services
projects portfolio

Discover Our Ready-to-Assemble (RTA)
Kitchen Cabinets Collection

Transform your kitchen with our premium selection of Ready-to-Assemble (RTA) cabinets. Designed with quality, style, and affordability in mind, our RTA cabinets offer a perfect solution for those looking to upgrade their kitchen with ease. Whether you prefer a modern, sleek look or a timeless, classic design, our collection has something to suit every taste and budget.

Essential

Affordable and durable cabinets offering practical designs for everyday kitchen needs.

Premium

Luxurious cabinets with advanced features, perfect for stylish and modern kitchens.

Elite

High-end cabinets with superior craftsmanship and custom options for luxury kitchens.

Need something different? If you’re looking for unique designs, finishes, or specific measurements, we’re here to help. Inquire today to explore additional options tailored to your needs.

view faqs
Get a free quote

A Terzetto

A Terzetto is a harmonious trio, and at Terzetto Homes, we bring together the three essential ‘voices’ for your home remodel project — interior designer, builder, and you, the homeowner. Our harmonious approach ensures a seamless renovation experience, whether you’re updating a kitchen, remodeling a bathroom, or undertaking a whole-home remodel.

Learn More

Empty-nester? Remodel and create your next chapter!

Learn More

Smart home remodeling for your growing family.

Learn More

Innovative design for your ever-evolving lifestyle.

Learn More

Why choose Terzetto Homes for your next home remodel?

Custom Home Renovation: We offer tailored solutions that cater to your unique needs, transforming homes in Ottawa into spaces that reflect your personal style and functionality requirements.

Design Build Services: Our comprehensive design and build services ensure a hassle-free experience, integrating every aspect of your project from initial concept to final touches seamlessly.

Expert Craftsmanship: We pride ourselves on our quality and attention to detail, delivering superior home renovations that exceed expectations in Ottawa.

contact us

Schedule a Consultation

Ready to transform your home? Let’s bring your vision to life! Schedule a free 30-minute site consultation with us today and take the first step toward your dream space. In this no-commitment session, you’ll receive a custom project proposal tailored to your unique needs and style. Don’t wait—your dream home starts here!
Book A Consultation
